sections.label: Verse 1
lines: Khasiangtho in kei hong tuam ciang,
Lungsim leh khut te lamto in diangin la kasa,
Nuam na khitui te'n Topa pahtawi uh hi,
Lungdamna leh phatna tawh ka daiom mawk loh nang in ah,
(Kathum, katauna te lamna tawh nonghei sak
(Launa leh zumna te hong beipah a)3

sections.label: Verse 4
lines: (Laam in diangin Topa kong pahtawi hi)3
